title: Unexpected Right Join Assertion Error
description:
Dear MonetDB Developers,

I encountered an unexpected internal error related to a right join. If you have the opportunity to take a look, I would greatly appreciate your time and efforts.

```sql
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS t0(c0 INT);
SELECT *
FROM t0
         RIGHT JOIN (VALUES (1)) AS subQuery1(col_1) ON EXISTS (VALUES (CASE subQuery1.col_1 WHEN subQuery1.col_1 THEN 1 END));
-- unexpected end of file                          
```
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c0 INT, c1 VARCHAR(50), c2 DATE);
INSERT INTO t1(c0, c1, c2) VALUES (1, 'test', DATE('2023-01-01'));
CREATE TABLE t2(c0 INT, c1 FLOAT);
SELECT * FROM t1 RIGHT JOIN t2 ON t1.c0 IS NOT NULL AND t2.c0 = t1.c0;
SELECT * FROM t1 RIGHT JOIN (VALUES (2), (3)) AS subQuery2(col_1) ON subQuery2.col_1 = subQuery2.col_1;
key_bug_features: Right join with EXISTS clause causes assertion error
